policy_references: Section 1: No alcohol reimbursement under Meals category
Section 4: Ineligible category - alcohol is not reimbursable
explanation: The claim contains an explicit alcohol line ($60.00) which is a non-reimbursable category under policy. The meals line ($85.00) is noted as 'mostly cocktails' which falls under alcohol/personal entertainment and is also ineligible. Ground transport ($18.00) is individually eligible but the overall claim has no valid reimbursable remainder once ineligible lines are removed - the only eligible item is below the minimum threshold for standalone processing. Entire claim rejected.

arguments.topics: alcohol, meals, ground transport, receipts, ineligible, manual review

alcohol: Section 4 - Ineligible category (e.g. alcohol, personal entertainment)
meals: Section 1 - Meals per-diem, no alcohol reimbursement

line_results.reason: Exceeds tier_2 meal cap of $65/day; excess deducted.
Category 'alcohol' is not reimbursable per policy.
